About Us

The Book Fair at Hotel Clarks Amer is a one-of-a-kind event celebrating the world of literature. Join us for a fun-filled and inspiring experience!

Our Venue

Hotel Clarks Amer, Jaipur is a renowned luxury hotel known for hosting large-scale events. It provides the perfect ambiance for this literary festival.
